description: User clicks the 'Submit study' button to finalize the booking setup.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the black 'Submit study' button on the review page.

description: The application navigates from the review screen to the participants dashboard.
User examines the participants dashboard, which displays a notification that the study is currently in review.
The screen briefly turns white, indicating a page refresh or a temporary loading state during the session.
frame_description: A blank white screen is visible between page states.

description: User clicks on the 'Settings' tab in the study dashboard navigation.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Settings' option in the top right navigation menu.

description: The application navigates to the study settings page.
